positioning: S7 Soul Sovereignty is part of the 1320 Soul Origin Code System™, a symbolic self-reflection architecture. It is designed to help users reflect on 灵魂主权 as a non-deterministic awareness and integration layer. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or fortune-telling.

calculation_dependency.zero_handling: Keep 0 as a valid code. Do not convert 0 unless a future product rule explicitly says otherwise.

rendering_blocks.title: What Your Soul Is Learning to Reclaim
rendering_blocks.title_zh: 灵魂正在学习收回什么

entries.sovereignty_essence: Your sovereignty begins through returning to yourself before reacting to the field around you.
entries.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_reclaim: This code reflects a soul learning to reclaim presence, self-contact, and the right to pause before choosing.
entries.where_power_was_given_away: Patterns become visible when the person notices how quickly they leave their own center to manage the expectations, emotions, or urgency of others.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_sovereignty: When distorted, sovereignty may become withdrawal, passivity, or a quiet refusal to participate because the person is afraid of being influenced.
entries.mature_sovereignty_expression: Mature sovereignty appears as the ability to stay connected to life while remaining inwardly located in the self.
entries.wisewave_reflection: You do not need to disappear in order to be free. Return first, then respond.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.sovereignty_essence: Your sovereignty strengthens when you stop outsourcing permission and begin honoring clear inner signals.
entries.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_reclaim: This code reflects a soul learning to trust perception, intuition, and choice without needing perfect certainty.
entries.where_power_was_given_away: Patterns become visible where the person repeatedly asks others to confirm what the body, heart, or awareness has already recognized.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_sovereignty: When distorted, sovereignty may become stubbornness, impulsive certainty, or rejecting useful feedback in order to feel independent.
entries.mature_sovereignty_expression: Mature sovereignty appears as discernment: the ability to listen, receive information, and still choose from inner truth.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Self-trust is not the refusal to learn. It is the quiet knowing that your final choice must return to you.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.sovereignty_essence: Your sovereignty emerges through the ability to choose without abandoning your limits, needs, or honest capacity.
entries.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_reclaim: This code reflects a soul learning that love, service, and responsibility must include the self.
entries.where_power_was_given_away: Patterns become visible when the person says yes too quickly, delays honest refusal, or confuses availability with worth.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_sovereignty: When distorted, sovereignty may become defensiveness, over-protection, or rigid walls that replace honest boundaries.
entries.mature_sovereignty_expression: Mature sovereignty appears as clear, kind limits that protect energy without closing the heart.
entries.wisewave_reflection: A boundary is not separation from love. It is the place where love becomes sustainable.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.sovereignty_essence: Your sovereignty is activated when truth becomes behavior, not only insight.
entries.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_reclaim: This code reflects a soul learning to move from awareness into grounded action, speech, and visible alignment.
entries.where_power_was_given_away: Patterns become visible when the person understands deeply but delays acting, speaks around the truth, or waits for conditions to feel safer.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_sovereignty: When distorted, sovereignty may become harsh truth-telling, urgency, or using clarity as a weapon instead of a bridge.
entries.mature_sovereignty_expression: Mature sovereignty appears as timely action that is direct, grounded, and respectful.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Truth becomes power when it enters the body, the voice, and the next honest step.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.sovereignty_essence: Your sovereignty grows when you no longer organize your life around approval, recognition, or emotional permission.
entries.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_reclaim: This code reflects a soul learning to belong to itself even when external agreement is not guaranteed.
entries.where_power_was_given_away: Patterns become visible where the person edits desires, softens truth, or delays direction until others validate the choice.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_sovereignty: When distorted, sovereignty may become rebellion for its own sake, rejecting connection to prove freedom.
entries.mature_sovereignty_expression: Mature sovereignty appears as the ability to remain open to connection without needing approval to exist.
entries.wisewave_reflection: You are allowed to be real before everyone understands you.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.sovereignty_essence: Your sovereignty becomes stable when authority moves from concept into body, rhythm, and daily practice.
entries.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_reclaim: This code reflects a soul learning that inner authority is not a statement; it is lived through consistent choices.
entries.where_power_was_given_away: Patterns become visible when the person speaks of alignment but lives from urgency, overextension, or disembodied ideals.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_sovereignty: When distorted, sovereignty may become spiritual performance, identity attachment, or claiming authority before embodying responsibility.
entries.mature_sovereignty_expression: Mature sovereignty appears as calm consistency: the person becomes trustworthy to themselves through repeated aligned action.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Authority is not something you announce. It is something your life quietly proves through alignment.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.sovereignty_essence: Your sovereignty matures through taking responsibility without carrying what does not belong to you.
entries.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_reclaim: This code reflects a soul learning the difference between conscious ownership and over-responsibility.
entries.where_power_was_given_away: Patterns become visible where the person either takes on too much or avoids responsibility because it feels like loss of freedom.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_sovereignty: When distorted, sovereignty may become control, guilt, blame, or the belief that responsibility means carrying everything alone.
entries.mature_sovereignty_expression: Mature sovereignty appears as clean ownership: taking the next true action while returning other people's parts to them.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Responsibility is not a burden when it is clean. It becomes heavy only when you carry what is not yours.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.
